message.content:
@startuml
skinparam nodesep 100
skinparam ranksep 50

package "finest level" {
    note top of finest_level : U(k,2) -> F(U(k,2))
}

note bottom of intermediate_levels_1 : tau = Q(1)*F(U(k,1)) - R*Q(2)*F(U'(k',2))
note right of base_level : c(0) = U(k+,0) - R*U(k',1)

rectangle SDC <<SDC>> as sdc_finest
sdc_finest --> finest_level : restrict

interface IntermediateLevel1 <<intermediate levels(s)>> as ilvls1
ilvls1 --|> sdc_finest : prolongate/correct

database BaseLevel <<base level>> as blvl
blvl --|> ilvls1 : coarse correction/prolongation/tau calculation

@enduml
